theme_and_archetype.description: Authority, clarity, function-first. Optimized for operations, high data density, and fast decision making.
theme_and_archetype.emotional_tone: Utilitarian, precise, reliable, commanding. A 'Control Room' for fleet managers.

typography.guidelines: Do not use 'Inter'. Headlines MUST have tight letter spacing. Overlines/labels must be uppercase with wide tracking.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Control Room Grid (Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4)
layout_and_spacing.gap: gap-4 or gap-6 for tight data correlation
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous inside containers: p-4 or p-6
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-sm (Max 2px to 4px). Avoid rounded-lg or full.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense content, forms, and data. Center-align only for empty states.

surface_strategy.description: Expose the skeleton. Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle borders (border-neutral-200), NO drop shadows for cards. Use border-collapse style layouts for feature grids where appropriate.

components.cards: Flat white background, border-neutral-200, no shadow. Hover state: subtle border color darken.
components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-sm), high contrast. Primary: bg-[#0047FF] text-white. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-neutral-300 text-neutral-900.
components.tables: High density, text-sm, 1px border-b on rows, no vertical borders. Status badges use stark background with contrasting text.
components.forms: Shadcn standard but customized to zero/sm radius. Minimal padding. Use Shadcn components for Select, Input, Datepicker.
components.navigation: Solid white sidebar or top nav with hard bottom/right border. Active states marked with #0047FF left/bottom border.

motion.philosophy: Minimalist micro-interactions for feedback. No bouncy or distracting animations.
motion.transitions: transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out for buttons, table rows, and interactive elements.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weights. Avoid Duotone for this Swiss Brutalism archetype to maintain sharpness.

image_urls.description: Professional driver on phone, for driver profile or roster.
Professional driver in cab, for driver profile.
Satellite view of roads for map tracking background or duty tracking.

accessibility.contrast: Strict adherence to 4.5:1 ratio. Text colors must be explicitly defined on hover.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='create-duty-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. DO NOT USE 'Inter', 'Roboto', or generic fonts for headings.
Do NOT use drop shadows anywhere except for overlays (modals/dropdowns). Keep cards completely flat with 1px borders.
Prioritize data density. Dashboards should show a lot of data at a glance without feeling cluttered.
Use Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react). Make sure tables and charts use pure HTML+Tailwind or highly customized Shadcn without the default rounded Vercel-look.
Build the core Duty/Trip Management lifecycle (Created -> Assigned -> Accepted -> Started -> Completed -> Billed -> Closed) as the central focus.
Ensure all interactive elements have a descriptive data-testid.
